case_title: JOHN H WIEST VS. GOOGLE ADWORDS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-06-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOOGLE ADWORDS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
